proposed_relations.description: Project goals for the Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Improve traffic flow ■ Reduce bus travel time and improve reliability ■ Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to Staten Island destinations ■ Improve safety for all corridor users

decisions.rationale: These are the stated project goals of the Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study, presented on the project slides.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Improve traffic flow ■ Reduce bus travel time and improve reliability ■ Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to Staten Island destinations ■ Improve safety for all corridor users

proposed_relations.description: Causes of bus passenger delays identified in the Hylan Boulevard study

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Traffic congestion ■ Frequent express bus stops ■ Avoiding stopped buses ■ Avoiding parked cars ■ Narrow lanes ■ Paying fare on bus

decisions.rationale: This claim identifies causes of bus delays along the Hylan corridor, presented in the study slides.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Traffic congestion ■ Frequent express bus stops ■ Avoiding stopped buses ■ Avoiding parked cars ■ Narrow lanes ■ Paying fare on bus

proposed_relations.description: Existing traffic conditions along Hylan Boulevard during AM and PM peak periods

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Congestion occurs primarily northbound between Guyon and Seaver Avenues. ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better southbound.
■ Congestion is heaviest at New Dorp Lane and Tysens Lane ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better northbound.

decisions.rationale: This claim presents existing traffic conditions findings from the Hylan Boulevard study, directly from the project slides.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Congestion occurs primarily northbound between Guyon and Seaver Avenues. ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better southbound.
■ Congestion is heaviest at New Dorp Lane and Tysens Lane ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better northbound.
